---
title: "Diagnostic Classification Modeling"
subtitle: "Use R and Stan to estimate and evaluate diagnostic psychometric models"
details: |
  NCME 2026
sidebar: false
toc: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    template-partials: 
      - html/home/title-block.html
course-logo: /files/img/measr-hex.png
---

:::: {.home}

::: {.grid .course-details}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6}
### Instructor

- {{< fa user >}} &nbsp; [**{{< var instructor.name >}}**]({{< var instructor.url >}})
- {{< fa university >}} &nbsp; [{{< var instructor.work >}}]({{< var instructor.work_url >}})
- {{< fa envelope >}} &nbsp; [{{< var instructor.email >}}](mailto:{{< instructor.email >}})
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} &nbsp; [{{< var instructor.linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/{{< var instructor.linkedin >}})
- {{< fa brands bluesky >}} &nbsp; [\@{{< var instructor.bluesky >}}](https://bsky.app/profile/{{< var instructor.bluesky >}})

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-6}
### Next course

- {{< fa chalkboard-user >}} &nbsp; {{< var event.name >}}
- {{< fa calendar-alt >}} &nbsp; {{< var event.dates >}}
- {{< fa clock >}} &nbsp; {{< var event.time >}}
- {{< fa clock >}} &nbsp; {{< var event.time2 >}}
- {{< fa location-dot >}} &nbsp; {{< var event.location >}}
:::

:::

```{r echo=FALSE, eval = FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics(
  here::here("files", "img", "eval-flowchart.png"),
  error = FALSE
)
```

:::
